releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.2.5

新功能
- 在线激活：支持产品内选套餐、扫码支付、自动激活，无需人工分发激活码
- 激活等级徽章：右上角展示当前套餐等级，点击可升级
- 升级套餐：已激活用户可直接选择更高级套餐
- 过期提醒：非永久套餐到期前自动提醒续期

优化
- 激活流程术语统一
- 离线激活增加官网客服咨询引导
- 后端错误提示友好化
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.2.5

New Features
- Online activation: select plan, scan QR code to pay, auto-activate within the app
- Tier badge: shows current plan tier in top-right corner, click to upgrade
- Plan upgrade: activated users can directly choose higher-tier plans
- Expiry reminder: automatic renewal reminders for non-permanent licenses

Improvements
- Unified activation terminology
- Offline activation now guides users to contact support
- Friendlier backend error messages
